title: centaurea limbata subsp. hanryi
intro: Centaurea limbata subsp. hanryi, also known as a type of thistle, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea limbata subsp. hanryi include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
